name: BGM Suggester
description: Turn a scene + mood + duration into a structured BGM brief (style/bpm/mood-arc/keywords) and bridge it into Suno AI prompts and YouTube/Spotify/Epidemic search queries. No ffmpeg or model download needed.

description_i18n.zh: 把一段场景描述+情绪+时长，变成结构化 BGM 简报（风格/节拍/情绪曲线/关键词），并桥接到 Suno AI 和 YouTube/Spotify/Epidemic 搜索词。无需 ffmpeg 或模型下载。
description_i18n.en: Turn a scene + mood + duration into a structured BGM brief (style/bpm/mood-arc/keywords) and bridge it into Suno AI prompts and YouTube/Spotify/Epidemic search queries. No ffmpeg or model download needed.

author: OpenAkita
